query:
SELECT p.name, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority, LEFT(p.overview, 200) as overview_start, m.matchScore, m.matchReason
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1 AND m.matchScore BETWEEN 40 AND 79
ORDER BY m.matchScore DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT p.name, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority, LEFT(p.overview, 200) as overview_start, m.matchScore, m.matchReason
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1 AND m.matchScore BETWEEN 40 AND 79
ORDER BY m.matchScore DESC;

rows.name: Mt Ida Gold Project
rows.overview_start: Ballard Mining has reported encouraging results from regional prospects at its Mt Ida gold project in Western Australia, indicating potential for further development.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 2 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Renewable Energy Development
rows.overview_start: Planning approval has been granted for a large renewable energy development in regional Western Australia. This project will involve significant construction and potentially drilling.
rows.matchReason: 4 application tag(s) matched; 2 keyword(s) matched; Portable air relevant to drilling/compressor context

rows.name: Litchfield Minerals NT Exploration
rows.overview_start: Litchfield Minerals has appointed a new senior exploration geologist, Matt McGloin, to lead the company's exploration efforts in the Northern Territory. This indicates a renewed or strengthened focus
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Cobar District Copper-Antimony Exploration
rows.overview_start: West Cobar Metals has acquired two new exploration licence applications in New South Wales' Cobar district for copper-antimony exploration.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Wyemandoo Project Acquisition
rows.overview_start: Coppermoly has acquired a 100% stake in the Wyemandoo Project in Western Australia, expanding its Australian portfolio.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Mt Oxide Copper Hunt
rows.overview_start: True North Copper received a $250k government grant to accelerate its Queensland copper exploration quest over two years.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Nuckulla Hill Gold Project Exploration
rows.overview_start: Auravelle Metals is undertaking a detailed aeromagnetic survey covering the 40km strike extent of the Yarlbrinda Shear at its Nuckulla Hill gold project.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Queensland Petroleum Acreage Release
rows.overview_start: The Queensland government has released 12 new petroleum acreage areas for investment prospects in the Bowen/Surat and Cooper/Eromanga Basins. This initiative aims to attract new exploration and develo
rows.matchReason: Sector match: oil_gas; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Tuckanarra Gold Project
rows.overview_start: Odyssey Gold has confirmed gold mineralization at its Tuckanarra Gold Project, indicating ongoing exploration and potential for future development in Australia's gold sector.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: North Stanmore Project
rows.overview_start: Victory Metals has recorded the highest rare earths intercept at its North Stanmore project in WA to date, indicating promising exploration results.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: mining; 1 application tag(s) matched; 1 keyword(s) matched

rows.name: Northern Territory Flood Damaged Roads Repair
rows.overview_start: Widespread flooding across the Northern Territory has closed over 100 sections of road, requiring significant repair work, including filling more than 1,000 potholes. The cost of repairs is expected t
rows.matchReason: Sector match: infrastructure; 1 application tag(s) matched

rows.name: Cooper Basin Infrastructure Upgrade
rows.overview_start: Santos is replacing seven aging gas-run compressor stations with one electric compressor station to debottleneck upstream infrastructure and unlock future production growth from the Central Fields.
rows.matchReason: Sector match: oil_gas; Portable air relevant to drilling/compressor context

rows.name: Bass Strait Decommissioning Project (Umbilicals and Flexibles)
rows.overview_start: ExxonMobil has lodged the next stage of decommissioning plans for umbilicals and flexibles in Bass Strait with the offshore regulator. This involves the removal and disposal of subsea infrastructure.

rows.name: Iron ore expansion proposal
rows.overview_start: An iron ore expansion proposal has been referred for environmental assessment, signalling potential future development activities.

rows.name: Bass Strait Decommissioning Program
rows.overview_start: Victorian government inquiry into the decommissioning program for oil and gas infrastructure in the Bass Strait. Committee hears from Woodside, ExxonMobil, MUA, and NOPSEMA regarding the scope and met

rows.name: Pluto Seismic Survey
rows.overview_start: Woodside has submitted a proposal for a seismic survey as part of its ongoing reservoir management and surveillance program for the Pluto project.
